content_body:
We had a lovely stay in Forever Joy! The cabin is beautiful and relaxing. We enjoyed the Blue Ridge and Chattanooga area. The Tennessee Aquarium was awesome and we enjoyed the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway. The BBQ at the Pink Pig was delicious and the store at Mercier Orchards had great veggies and fruits. The fudge was also amazingly good! Highly recommend the Lilly Pad, if you have kids! The boys had a great time. The Cupcakes at the Sweet Shoppe are also very tasty if you have a sweet tooth.

Thanks for a wonderful stay!
title: Beautiful Stay in the North Georgia Mountains
